headline: McKesson CFO Transition Tests Capital Plans And Medical Surgical Separation
summary: McKesson (NYSE:MCK) announced that long-serving CFO Britt Vitalone will retire, with Kenny Cheung appointed as the new CFO. Vitalone will stay on as a strategic advisor to support Cheung and oversee the planned separation of the Medical Surgical Solutions segment. The transition marks a significant finance leadership change at a time when McKesson is preparing a major business reorganization. For investors tracking NYSE:MCK, this leadership change comes with the stock at $919.26 and showing...
